title: Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple
tagline: Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kallambalam is a suburb of Varkala Town situated in Thiruvananthapuram district.
overview.description: Kallambalam is a suburb of Varkala Town situated in Thiruvananthapuram district. Kallambalam joins Varkala with National Highway 66. It is 36 km north from state capital Trivandrum, 8.1 km East of Varkala, and 12 km West of Kilimanoor.

topPlaces.name: Karavaram
topPlaces.description: Karavaram is a village in Chirayinkeezhu Taluk of Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Ponganadu
topPlaces.description: Ponganadu is a village in the Thiruvananthapuram district, situated in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Sreenarayanapuram Temple
topPlaces.description: Sreenarayanapuram Mahavishnu Temple is an ancient Vishnu temple in Kerala, India. It is at Manakala (in Pathanamthitta) about 4 km (2.5 mi) from Adoor.

topPlaces.name: Navaikulam
topPlaces.description: Navaikulam is a panchayat in Varkala Taluk, it the northernmost tip of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated 11km east of Varkala town and 37km north of Trivandrum City along NH66.

topPlaces.name: Perumkulam
topPlaces.description: Perumkulam is a village in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. It is India's second and Kerala's first 'village of books'.

topPlaces.name: Ottoor
topPlaces.description: Ottoor is a panchayath in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated 7km south-east of Varkala city and 36km north of capital city Trivandrum.

topPlaces.name: Vennicode
topPlaces.description: Vennicode is an area of Cheruniyoor panchayat in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram District State of Kerala in India. The Nearest Railway Station is Akathumuri railway station and Airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport.

topPlaces.name: Manamboor
topPlaces.description: Manambur is a village in Varkala Taluk of Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated 9 km south-east of Varkala Town and 35 km north of State Capital city Trivandrum.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Changattu Sree Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karavaram, Ponganadu, Sreenarayanapuram Temple, Navaikulam, Perumkulam.
